title: Debugging Obsidian Templater Template
first_prompt: I need your help debugging the linkblog-template.md that's in my Templates folder. It's a Obsidian Templater template that runs a script adding frontmatter to a note and then moving it to the blog fol
summary: Irwin was attempting to debug an Obsidian Templater template, `linkblog-template.md`, which was designed to add frontmatter and move a note to the blog folder. After confirming the template's basic functionality, the conversation shifted to a refinement issue: the frontmatter only wrote correctly if the cursor was placed at the top of the file. The assistant diagnosed this as Templater's default cursor behavior and proposed modifying the template using `tp.file.cursor()` to force the frontmatter to write at the absolute beginning, regardless of where the user's cursor was positioned.
